languages.text: "Увы, Лорд-капитан... Сектор Бионика сильно пострадал во время бунта, поднятого Мастером Шепотов. Пока имплантационный трон не будет восстановлен, аугментирование невозможно. Мне жаль отказывать вам, но мы не можем позволить себе подвергать вашу жизнь такому риску".

traits.locale_text: "Увы, Лорд-капитан... Сектор Бионика сильно пострадал во время бунта, поднятого Мастером Шепотов. Пока имплантационный трон не будет восстановлен, аугментирование невозможно. Мне жаль отказывать вам, но мы не можем позволить себе подвергать вашу жизнь такому риску".
traits.speaker: Vivisector

languages.text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."
languages.original_text: "Увы, Лорд-капитан... Сектор Бионика сильно пострадал во время бунта, поднятого Мастером Шепотов. Пока имплантационный трон не будет восстановлен, аугментирование невозможно. Мне жаль отказывать вам, но мы не можем позволить себе подвергать вашу жизнь такому риску".

traits.locale_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

"Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible — we can only use it for inspections. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

"Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the central implantation chair is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

"Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

"Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible — we can only use it for inspections. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

languages.text: 「ああ、艦長様…囁きのマスタが始めた反乱の最中、セクター・ビオニカは酷く損傷を受けました。中央のインプラント・チェアが修復されるまでは、強化は不可能です。お断りして申し訳ありませんが、貴方の命をそんな危険にさらすことはできません」
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the central implantation chair is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、艦長様…囁きのマスタが始めた反乱の最中、セクター・ビオニカは酷く損傷を受けました。中央のインプラント・チェアが修復されるまでは、強化は不可能です。お断りして申し訳ありませんが、貴方の命をそんな危険にさらすことはできません。」

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki Lord Kaptan... Sektör Biyonika, Fısıltı Üstadı'nın başlattığı isyan sırasında ağır hasar gördü. İmplantasyon tahtı onarılana kadar ogmentasyon imkânsız. Sizi reddetmek bana acı veriyor ama hayatınızı böyle bir riske atamayız."
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki Lord Kaptan... Sektör Biyonika, Fısıltı Üstadı'nın başlattığı isyan sırasında ağır hasar gördü. İmplantasyon tahtı onarılana kadar ogmentasyon imkânsız. Sizi reddetmek bana acı veriyor ama hayatınızı böyle bir riske atamayız."

languages.text: «Por desgracia, Lord Capitán... El Sector Bionica sufrió graves daños durante el motín perpetrado por el maestro de susurros. No podemos instalar aumentos hasta que reparemos el trono de implantación. Me duele rechazar su solicitud, pero no puedo poner su vida en tan grave peligro».
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, Lord Capitán... El Sector Bionica sufrió graves daños durante el motín perpetrado por el maestro de susurros. No podemos instalar aumentos hasta que reparemos el trono de implantación. Me duele rechazar su solicitud, pero no puedo poner su vida en tan grave peligro».

languages.text: “唉，舰长大人……在低语之主发起的叛乱中，仿生区严重受损。在移植王座修好之前，无法进行植入物改造。拒绝您让我痛苦万分，但我们不能让您冒生命危险。”
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: “唉，舰长大人……在低语之主发起的叛乱中，仿生区严重受损。在移植王座修好之前，无法进行植入物改造。拒绝您让我痛苦万分，但我们不能让您冒生命危险。”

languages.text: « Malheureusement, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... le secteur Bionica a subi d'importants dégâts lors de la mutinerie provoquée par le maître des murmures. Jusqu'à ce que le fauteuil d'implantation soit réparé, il sera impossible de procéder à de nouvelles augmentations... Je regrette de ne pas pouvoir accéder à votre demande, mais nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de vous faire courir un tel risque. »
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: « Malheureusement, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... le secteur Bionica a subi d'importants dégâts lors de la mutinerie provoquée par le maître des murmures. Jusqu'à ce que le fauteuil d'implantation soit réparé, il sera impossible de procéder à de nouvelles augmentations... Je regrette de ne pas pouvoir accéder à votre demande, mais nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de vous faire courir un tel risque. »

languages.text: "Leider, Lord Captain ... wurde der Sektor Bionica bei der Meuterei durch den Meister des Geflüsters stark beschädigt. Bis zur Reparatur des Implantationsthrons kann keine Augmentation durchgeführt werden. Ich weise Euch nur ungern zurück, aber wir können Euer Leben nicht einem solchen Risiko aussetzen."
languages.original_text: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."

traits.locale_text: "Leider, Lord Captain ... wurde der Sektor Bionica bei der Meuterei durch den Meister des Geflüsters stark beschädigt. Bis zur Reparatur des Implantationsthrons kann keine Augmentation durchgeführt werden. Ich weise Euch nur ungern zurück, aber wir können Euer Leben nicht einem solchen Risiko aussetzen."
